name: villa-lumira
title: Timeless Chic 4BR Private Pool Villa • Petitenget
description: Villa Lumira Bali is nestled in the heart of Petitenget, blending timeless Balinese charm with modern comfort. Traditional thatched roofs, carved wood details and rattan ceilings create a peaceful tropical oasis surrounded by lush gardens. Elegant bedrooms feature ensuite bathrooms with natural stone finishes and indoor/outdoor showers. Enjoy the private pool, sun-drenched terrace and a traditional Balinese temple that adds a serene touch of island spirituality.The spaceWelcome to Villa Lumira, your tropical haven in the heart of Petitenget, where timeless Balinese charm meets modern comfort.Recently renovated and thoughtfully expanded, the villa now features a larger private pool, sun-drenched deck and a stylish lounge area by the water,perfect for relaxed afternoons or candlelit evenings surrounded by lush tropical gardens.Every space has been carefully upgraded to offer a serene and elegant retreat while preserving the spirit of Balinese design.The villa offers four comfortable bedrooms, each with king-size beds, safety boxes and ensuite bathrooms with natural stone finishes, indoor and outdoor showers, and calming garden views.At the heart of the villa, a semi-open living space blends indoor elegance with tropical breezes. Relax on generous designer sofas and enjoy movie nights on the 75” LG Smart TV, while the fully equipped kitchen and spacious dining area create the perfect setting for shared meals and conversations.Located in a secure private villa complex with 24/7 security, Villa Lumira sits on a quiet lane just across from the iconic Pison Coffee, in one of Bali’s most sought-after neighborhoods.Within easy walking distance you’ll find some of Petitenget’s favorite spots, including Pison, Okuzono, Taco Casa, La Baracca, Sardine, Nook, Livingstone, as well as Beatrix Spa, Jiwa Wellness, and convenient 24-hour mini marts.Whether you’re craving artisan coffee, a sunset cocktail, a romantic dinner, or a relaxing massage — everything is just steps away.And whe
